name: Pattern Detection Engine
description: Daily (4:30 PM ET, Mon-Fri): Analyzes price history for short-term watchlist stocks to detect bull flags, ascending triangles, breakouts, and mean reversion setups. Calculates measured move targets and creates trade setup alerts.

parameters.content:
## Pattern Detection Engine

Required: postgresApi
Detects: bull flags, breakouts, mean reversion
Uses 60-day price history from daily_prices

parameters.query: SELECT w.ticker, t.company_name FROM watchlists w JOIN tickers t ON w.ticker = t.ticker WHERE w.strategy = 'short_term' AND w.status = 'active' ORDER BY w.score DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT price_date, open_price, high_price, low_price, close_price, volume FROM daily_prices WHERE ticker = ? ORDER BY price_date DESC LIMIT 60
INSERT INTO alerts (ticker, alert_type, strategy, message, severity, metadata) VALUES (?, ?, 'short_term', ?, 'warning', ?::jsonb);

queryParameters.value: ={{$json.ticker}}: {{$json.pattern}} detected. Entry ~${{$json.current_price}}, Target ${{$json.target_price}}, Stop ${{$json.stop_loss}}. Vol ratio: {{$json.volume_ratio}}x
